tasks.title: Add light mode theme with toggle
tasks.description: Implement a complete light mode theme with a header toggle button. Convert all hardcoded colors in CSS to custom properties, define a light theme palette via [data-theme='light'], add a toggle button replacing the header-spacer, and create theme.js for persistence and OS preference detection.
tasks.acceptance_criteria:
1. Light color scheme defined via [data-theme='light'] CSS custom properties
2. Toggle button visible in header with sun/moon icons
3. Theme persisted in localStorage, restored on reload
4. Defaults to OS prefers-color-scheme when no saved preference
5. All UI components render correctly in both themes
6. Confetti works in both themes
7. Toggle has appropriate aria labels

checklist.description: Add new CSS custom properties to :root for all hardcoded colors
steps: Add --border-subtle, --border-light, --border-medium, --hover-overlay, --title-gradient-start, --title-gradient-end, --cell-hover-bg, --cell-hover-border, --color-fixed-border, --color-complete-border, --backdrop-bg, --shadow-heavy, --bg-inset, --color-success, --color-success-bg to :root with dark theme values
Replace all hardcoded color values in style.css with the corresponding CSS variables
Verify no hardcoded theme-dependent colors remain in the CSS (search for rgba and hex colors)

checklist.description: Define complete light theme via [data-theme='light'] selector
steps: Add [data-theme='light'] block after :root in style.css overriding all color variables
Use the warm paper palette from claudeMd: cream backgrounds, dark slate text, adjusted greens and golds
Open index.html in browser, manually add data-theme='light' to html element, verify all components render correctly

checklist.description: Add theme toggle button in the header
steps: Replace .header-spacer div with a theme toggle button using header-btn class
Include inline sun SVG (for light mode display) and moon SVG (for dark mode display)
Add aria-label attribute that changes based on current theme
Verify button is visible and aligned correctly in the header

checklist.description: Add inline theme initialization script in <head> to prevent flash
steps: Add inline <script> in <head> after the CSS link that reads localStorage('theme')
If saved preference exists, set data-theme on documentElement immediately
If no saved preference, check prefers-color-scheme media query and set accordingly
Verify no flash of wrong theme on page reload

checklist.description: Create js/theme.js with toggle logic and persistence
steps: Create js/theme.js using IIFE pattern with 'use strict' (matching existing code style)
Implement toggle click handler that switches data-theme and saves to localStorage
Implement icon visibility toggling (sun shown in light mode, moon shown in dark mode)
Update aria-label on toggle based on current theme
Add script tag for theme.js in index.html before confetti.js

checklist.description: OS preference detection and change listener
steps: When no localStorage preference exists, default to prefers-color-scheme result
Add matchMedia change event listener so theme updates if OS preference changes (only when user hasn't manually set preference)
Test by toggling OS dark mode with no saved localStorage value

checklist.description: All UI components render correctly in light mode
steps: Verify grid cells: empty, fixed (green), selected (gold), swap-target, complete states all look correct
Verify modals: help modal and completion modal backgrounds, text, and buttons are readable
Verify header: title gradient, help button, toggle button, border all render properly
Verify swap counter, message bar, footer text are all readable
Verify share preview and result words in completion modal

checklist.description: Confetti celebration works in both themes
steps: Confetti uses canvas with fixed bright colors on transparent overlay — verify it displays correctly against light background
Complete a puzzle in light mode and verify confetti is visible

quality_checklist.description: No hardcoded theme-dependent colors remain in CSS outside :root and [data-theme] blocks
steps: Search style.css for hex colors (#xxx) and rgba values outside of :root/[data-theme='light'] blocks
Verify all found colors are either theme-independent (e.g., white on .btn-primary) or use var() references

quality_checklist.description: Theme JavaScript follows existing code conventions
steps: Verify theme.js uses IIFE, 'use strict', var declarations (no let/const/arrow functions)
Verify no unnecessary complexity — simple toggle, save, restore pattern

quality_checklist.description: Light theme palette is intentional and polished, not a mechanical inversion
steps: Check that light theme has appropriate contrast ratios for text readability
Verify green (fixed/complete) cells are distinct and readable on light backgrounds
Verify selection gold stands out against cream background

quality_checklist.description: No flash of wrong theme on page load
steps: Verify inline script in <head> sets data-theme before body renders
Test by setting theme to light, reloading — should not flash dark then switch

checks.description: Theme toggle is visible and functional in header
steps: Open http://localhost:3000 in browser
Verify a moon/sun icon button is visible in the top-right of the header
Click the toggle — theme should switch between dark and light
Verify the icon changes (moon in dark mode, sun in light mode)

checks.description: Theme preference persists across page reloads
steps: Switch to light mode via toggle
Reload the page
Verify the app loads in light mode without flash of dark mode
Check localStorage contains 'theme' key with value 'light'

checks.description: All UI components render correctly in light mode
steps: In light mode, verify: cream/off-white background, dark text, readable grid cells
Verify fixed cells show green background with readable text
Click a cell — verify gold selection highlight is visible
Open help modal — verify it's readable with proper contrast
Verify swap counter and footer text are visible

checks.description: All UI components render correctly in dark mode
steps: Switch back to dark mode
Verify dark background, light text, all cells render as before
Open help modal — verify dark theme styling
Verify no visual regressions from original dark theme
In dark mode, inspect toggle button — aria-label should say 'Switch to light mode'
Click toggle to switch to light mode — aria-label should say 'Switch to dark mode'
